supersedes: none — no active pack existed before Gate 187
global_rules: Read all materially changed runtime/schema/test files end to end before claiming the capital-deployment authority slice is implemented.
Use the latest closed Gate 181-186 pack as evidence input only; do not copy its structure as authority over this new pack.
A request to complete multiple gates does not waive per-gate sequencing, validation, router updates, or closeout.
Gate 188 must admit new naming through the vocabulary workflow before merge if new canonical terms are required.
Gate 189 must use the repo-native capital snapshot path for the bounded v1 proof slice unless a later leaf proves that path insufficient.
Gate 190 must not create a second posture engine, a full arbiter, or close-position behaviour.

LEAF-G187-001.title: Install the capital-deployment authority planning quartet and scope note
LEAF-G187-001.objective: Create the active gates/leaves/execution-log/checklist/scope-note files for Gates 187-191 and freeze the first-slice truth split.
ordered_actions: Create the active gates/leaves/execution-log/checklist/scope-note files for Gates 187-191.
Freeze the first slice as new-opening capital authorisation only.
Keep Gate 187 planning-only; do not edit runtime behaviour in this bootstrap gate.
forbidden_actions: Do not start editing runtime code in Gate 187.
Do not smuggle vocabulary admission in as if it were already done.
Do not collapse close-position, recommendation-memory, and portfolio-arbitration future scope into this first slice.
expected_evidence: Active planning quartet and bounded scope note exist with Gates 187-191 and the first-slice truth split.
Pack remains planning-only at Gate 187.
definition_of_done: Pack surfaces exist and the first-slice truth split is explicit.
No runtime behaviour under src/ changes in Gate 187.
LEAF-G187-001.packaging_requirement: record in the active execution log and include a fresh full-history repo zip whenever the operator requests a handoff or the pack reaches a gate closeout

LEAF-G187-002.packaging_requirement: record in the active execution log and include a fresh full-history repo zip whenever the operator requests a handoff or the pack reaches a gate closeout
